autoStart.label: Start with Windows
autoStart.description: Automatically launch the assistant silently on startup.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Irreversible actions that will affect your account and data.
dangerZone.modalWarning1: This action will permanently delete your account, all chat history, tasks, events, and settings.
dangerZone.modalWarning2: The app will delete your account completely. This CANNOT be undone.

account.title: Account & Security
account.error: Incorrect password or an error occurred.
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

llm.title: LLM Providers
llm.openaiKeyDesc: Enter your OpenAI API key to use GPT models.
llm.geminiKeyDesc: Enter your Gemini API key to use Google models.
llm.ollamaUrlDesc: URL for your local Ollama instance (default: http://localhost:11434).
llm.ollamaAutoConnDesc: The system is programmed to automatically connect to local Ollama. Please ensure Ollama is running on your computer.
llm.systemPromptDesc: Provide a custom system prompt to define the assistant behavior.
llm.placeholderSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant...

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.noPlugins: No plugins found on the server.

task_plugin.name: Task Manager
task_plugin.description: Create, track, and manage your to-do list.

web_search_plugin.name: Web Search
web_search_plugin.description: Searches the internet for information via DuckDuckGo.

memory_plugin.name: Memory
memory_plugin.description: Provides tools to manipulate the user explicit memory.

flaky_tool_plugin.name: Flaky Tool (Error Simulator)
flaky_tool_plugin.description: A test tool with simulated failure rates to test AI auto-correction capabilities.

chat.title: Chat
chat.greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
chat.disclaimer: AAA can make mistakes. Verify important information.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your AI Assistant

wizard.errorConnGeneric: Connection error. Please ensure backend is running.
wizard.headerDesc: Run AI completely free & securely on your machine
wizard.step2Desc: Ollama is an open-source platform that helps you run large language models locally.
wizard.step3Desc1: Now we need to download an AI model. Recommended:
wizard.step3Desc2: Download time depends on your internet speed.
wizard.step4Desc: AI system has been successfully installed and configured.
wizard.btnSkipText: Skip this step, I will use API Key (OpenAI/Gemini)

promptLibrary.title: Prompt Library
promptLibrary.subtitle: Suggestions to use AAA smart features.

schedule.title: Schedule Event
schedule.desc: Ask AI to set a reminder or schedule.
schedule.prompt: Please schedule a reminder for me to [do something] at [time].

memory.title: Remember Info
memory.prompt: Please remember this information about me: [Information to remember].

task.title: Add Task
task.desc: Add an item to your to-do list.
task.prompt: Add to my to-do list: [Task name].

query.title: Check Schedule
query.desc: Ask if you have any schedule today.
query.prompt: Do I have any events or tasks scheduled for today?

email_check.title: Check Email
email_check.desc: Ask AI to scan inbox and report important emails.
email_check.prompt: Please check my inbox. Are there any new or important emails I need to handle today? If so, summarize the main points.
